description_long: This is a Kalashnikov-style assault rifle featuring a black metal receiver and barrel, complemented by wooden furniture on the handguard and pistol grip. The rifle is equipped with a folding metal stock, which is currently extended, and a detachable curved magazine typical of AK-pattern rifles. The front sight is a post type, and the rear sight is a notched tangent, both made of metal. The muzzle is fitted with a slanted flash hider, and the overall finish is a mix of matte and glossy surfaces, with the wood showing a natural brown grain. The rifle's construction suggests durability and reliability, with visible rivets and mechanical details along the receiver and stock hinge.
description: A Kalashnikov-style assault rifle with black metal and brown wooden parts, featuring a folding stock and a curved detachable magazine.
description_view_0: Front view showing the muzzle, front sight post, and the narrow profile of the barrel and handguard.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the full length of the rifle, wooden handguard and grip, folding stock, and curved magazine.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the buttstock, rear sight, and the slim profile of the receiver.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the ejection port, fire selector, and the overall structure of the rifle with its folding stock.
